programme.title: Ghost Brothers: Lights Out
programme.desc: Dalen Spratt, Juwan Mass and Marcus Harvey check into a Michigan asylum to determine what truly haunts its abandoned grounds; as the guys sift through the facility's sordid past, they encounter restless souls who refuse to be forgotten in death.

programme.title: Ghost Brothers: Lights Out

programme.title: Ghost Brothers: Lights Out

programme.title: Ghost Adventures

programme.title: Ghost Adventures

programme.title: Ghost Adventures

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Zak and the crew head to San Francisco to investigate the historic William Westerfeld House, which played host to satanic rituals performed by underground occultist filmmaker Kenneth Anger and Church of Satan founder Anton LaVey.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures

programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate the March Field Air Museum in Riverside, Calif., where employees have reported hearing voices, seeing artifacts move and feeling spirits move through their bodies.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures

programme.title: Ghost Adventures

However, problems keep coming one after another, forcing Mutiara to become even stronger to survive them. There are even people around her who are always cruel and hateful toward her. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: KAU DITAKDIRKAN UNTUKKU 234
programme.desc: Alya is a tough, independent tomboy girl. He must care for his mother, who has kidney disease, in a life full of challenges. Alya must provide for her family's living expenses in addition to caring for her mother and nephew. After that, he endured difficult work and had to confront the sometimes-difficult realities.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: RAYUAN PEDAS NONA CABE
programme.desc: Since his mother died, Marvin has been living with Agus, his father, and his new brother, Ramon. Since childhood, Marvin has hated Ramon because he always received gifts from Agus while Marvin received punishments, and he never considered Ramon his brother. Eleven years later, Ramon was doing community service at a chili plantation, and one of the farmers was Desi.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day when Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend Rangga (Joshua Otay) with another woman. Dania was shocked because she did not expect her boyfriend to have an affair with another woman behind her back. After that, Dania brooded alone in a park. She said she wished someone would give her a hug when she was vulnerable like that.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Ching-chi abruptly has chest pain. After receiving treatment, Ching-chi insists on working while keeping Kam-kuk in the dark. Ka-chun is worried. Wai-man offers complimentary treatment to a poorly kid called Little Him and Him’s mother. Shuk-foon approaches some lawyer as she arranges for Yam-yuen’s shares to be transferred to Wai-man.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang takes an unconscious Wing-sum to a hotel room as he wants to molest her. Yee-ting shows false concern for Wing-sum, who suspects Yee-ting has drugged her. Wing-sum is wary of Yee-ting. Sis Fung and Lik-to find out Shuk-foon has gone to the lawyer office, so they put pressure on Pui-ha.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Yin-cho tells Yee-ting he passed out because he was exhausted. But Yee-ting discovers some drug that he has dropped. While returning the medicine to Yin-cho, Yee-ting asks him why he takes it. Yin-cho does not want to say anything. On her way to work at the clinic, Wing-yan runs into Yee-ting.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wing-sum is shocked to see Shuk-foon lying on the floor. She is unconscious and her head is bleeding. After performing resuscitation, the doctor points out Shuk-foon is likely to develop paralysis. Sai-hang seizes some opportunity to sell Yam Yuen’s factory and repay his debt.

programme.title: Heroes In White
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Wai-man and Wing-sum go with Wing-yan to file a report to the police. Wai-man eventually forgets about suing Sai-hang and his father as he wants to protect Wing-yan. Lik-to, in his capacity as Shuk-foon’s younger brother, launches a custody battle against Wai-man.

programme.title: Not Others
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: The Midnight Studio
programme.desc: The series tells a thrilling story of mean photographer Seo Ki Joo (Joo Won) who runs a photo studio that exists only for the deceased, passionate lawyer Han Boo (Kwon Nara) and the eerie night visitors, who travel between life and death

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] The story revolves around Kim Eun Mi (Jeon Hye Jin), a careless physical therapist, and Kim Jin Hee (Choi Soo Young), a free-spirited adult daughter who works as a police officer, living together like ‘strangers’. Faced with the complexities of life, can they mend the rift between them?

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Why Is He Still Single
programme.desc: A quirky yet kind-hearted man, firmly against marriage, sparks humor and reflection as he navigates life. Despite his eccentricity, he finally meets the woman of his dreams and must decide how to win her heart.

programme.title: Dear Enemy
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Cantik Cantik Ora Ngapak Ora Kepenak
programme.desc: Ayu always uses very strong ngapak or medok language. In her search for her biological father, Ayu meets Beni who constantly questions Ayu's ngapak speaking style.

programme.title: Masuk Ke Hatiku Pelan Pelan Aja Neng Bajaj
programme.desc: Sherin, who was angry at her brother and also her father, eventually chose to leave home. There, Sherin then worked as a mechanic in a bajaj workshop. It turns out that Sherin had fallen in love with a handsome bajaj driver, who had a younger brother still in elementary school, who was once hit by Sherin.

programme.title: Trio Gabut Kursus Iman (Spesial Ramadan)
programme.desc: The story begins with three young men, Billy, Ge, and Qausar, who are wanted by the police for allegedly practicing illegal circumcision. Not only that, they are also accused of kidnapping the child of a gangster boss named Selfi, played by Syahnaz. To protect themselves from capture and these accusations, they try to escape and become temporary students at a boarding school. This leads them to me

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Cantik Cantik Ora Ngapak Ora Kepenak

programme.title: Otw Pelaminan, Gas Gak Pake Rem
programme.desc: Once a former lover, Alana eventually got close to Niko again. In order to seek forgiveness from Niko, Alana agreed to be a matchmaker to bring Niko closer to a woman named Tiar. However, secretly, Alana fell in love with Niko again, and without realizing it, Niko also still loved Alana.

programme.title: Cinta Kadang Gulali Ke Bawah Kadang Gulali Keatas
programme.desc: Ruby has to take her mother's place selling cotton candy in front of the school. While serving a little girl, Ruby is accused by Angkasa of being part of a child kidnapping syndicate. Ruby refuses to be accused in such a way and defends herself. What happens next?

programme.title: Hot Tea Hot Tea Kalau Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Zulfa and Kevin were forced to look for partners at a matchmaking agency, but they were betrayed by their respective partners. Because Zulfa and Kevin both needed partners for a mission, the matchmaking agency suggested that they work together.

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta S1
programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: Apa Harus Dipatok Ayam Biar Dinotice
programme.desc: Just as they were about to get back together, Farah (Glenca Chysara) saw Doni (Qausar Harta Yudana) being affectionate with another girl. But Doni said that Farah had misunderstood. Farah didn't want to forgive him just like that. As a result, Doni was asked to take care of chickens as a sign of his sincerity.

programme.desc: Maya (Shanice Margaretha) feels abandoned by Sigit (Kiki Farrel), the man she likes, because Sigit often uploads videos with a beautiful girl. Maya is determined to change her appearance and behavior.

programme.title: Trio Gabut Kursus Iman (Spesial Ramadan)
programme.desc: The story begins with three young men, Billy, Ge, and Qausar, who are wanted by the police for allegedly practicing illegal circumcision. Not only that, they are also accused of kidnapping the child of a gangster boss named Selfi, played by Syahnaz. To protect themselves from capture and these accusations, they try to escape and become temporary students at a boarding school. This leads them to me

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Ganteng Ganteng Bau Domba, Tapi Aku Suka
programme.desc: Yosi was heartbroken when she found out that her brother-in-law was the guy she had been crushing on since high school and that she had to marry her own brother. But everything changed when Ryan, a local sheep farmer, came along and healed her broken heart. Ryan had fallen in love with Yosi.

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Cantik Cantik Ora Ngapak Ora Kepenak
programme.desc: Ayu always uses very strong ngapak or medok language. In her search for her biological father, Ayu meets Beni who constantly questions Ayu's ngapak speaking style.

programme.title: Masuk Ke Hatiku Pelan Pelan Aja Neng Bajaj
programme.desc: Sherin, who was angry at her brother and also her father, eventually chose to leave home. There, Sherin then worked as a mechanic in a bajaj workshop. It turns out that Sherin had fallen in love with a handsome bajaj driver, who had a younger brother still in elementary school, who was once hit by Sherin.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Mantanan Sama Gue Mantenan Sama Dia, Chuaks
programme.desc: Tasya and Suji met in the park when both of them were dumped by their boyfriends at the same time. They became closer as Tasya asked Suji to be her fake boyfriend, so that her ex would get jealous of her. Since they spent a lot of time together, their relationship became serious.

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta S1
programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: Bang Angkot Please Do Your Magic
programme.desc: Yuli, the beautiful porter who refused to be seen as weak. But Nazar deliberately continued to help her.
